channel.title: summarizedStoriesBreakingOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesBreakingOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Canada Claims Its Gold Supply Is Traceable. An Investigation Found Otherwise.
item.description: A supply chain investigation into Canadian gold traced the metal to a Colombian mine operating under cartel control.

item.title: Missouri and Illinois Brace for Severe Storms and Potential Tornadoes
item.description: Forecasters identified the St. Louis to Memphis corridor as the highest-risk zone, part of an ongoing stretch of dangerous weather across the Midwest.

item.title: Security Measures at the White House Correspondents' Dinner Examined After Shooting
item.description: The shooting at the Correspondents' dinner prompted scrutiny of event security protocols and questions about how close the alleged gunman came to the president.

item.title: Melania Trump Calls on ABC to Respond to Jimmy Kimmel's Joke
item.description: Days before the Correspondents' dinner shooting, Kimmel delivered a mock version of the event's speech during a television segment, prompting the first lady's public rebuke.
